title: Tic-Tac-Toe
description: The ultimate strategic battle of circles and crosses. Challenge your wits in this timeless classic!

title: Memory Match
description: Sharpen your mind by finding pairs of hidden symbols. How fast can you clear the board?

title: Neon Snake
description: Navigate the neon grid, consume energy, and grow. Just don't bite your own tail!

title: Brick Breaker
description: Shatter the glass ceiling! Control the paddle and destroy every brick on the screen.

title: Cyber Runner
description: Jump, slide, and sprint through a digital world of platforms and obstacles.

title: Road Crosser
description: Timing is everything. Can you navigate the busy cyber-highway and survive?

title: Whack-a-Bug
description: Stop the system bugs! Click them as they appear to save the GamerHub mainframe.

title: Star Siege
description: Defend the galaxy against waves of alien invaders in this intense space shooter.

title: Flutter Bird
description: Tap to defy gravity. How long can you stay airborne through the pipe maze?

title: Cyber Mine
description: Use logic to map out hidden mines. A single mistake could be explosive!
